technical_replicate: We performed FLAG-NUP153 IP followed by western blotting in triplicate.
experimental_design: NUP153 depletion leads to a significant loss of CTCF (~60%) and SMC3 (~86%) binding genome-wide
factor_value: NUP153 mediates CTCF and cohesin binding at cis-regulatory elements and TAD boundaries
number_of_fractions: Micrococcal nuclease (MNase) treatment of the nuclear fraction (P1) resulted in the elution of chromatin binding proteins into the soluble nuclear fraction (S3).
number_of_technical_replicates: We performed FLAG-NUP153 IP followed by western blotting in triplicate.
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate (mouse ES cell line) and 2 fractions.
